label: Développer sa pensée critique - Cours ULB

link.description:
This section presents the online course on critical thinking, titled "Developing Your Critical Thinking", offered by Guy Haarscher at the Université libre de Bruxelles (ULB).

The course is available in French and can be accessed for free on the ULB platform. It covers the fundamental concepts of critical thinking, cognitive biases, and fallacious arguments, and provides tools to analyze and evaluate information rigorously.

We have also created summaries and commentary for some of the course modules to help learners better understand the content and apply the principles of critical thinking in their daily lives.
